creator: barzog@telecom.by
text:
portupgrade bind94-base fails with following error:

install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /var/tmp/usr/ports/dns/bind94/work/bind-9.4.3-P3/doc/arm/Bv9ARM.pdf /usr/share/doc/bind94/
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /var/tmp/usr/ports/dns/bind94/work/bind-9.4.3-P3/doc/misc/[a-z]* /usr/share/doc/bind94/misc
/bin/cp /var/tmp/usr/ports/dns/bind94/work/bind-9.4.3-P3/CHANGES /var/tmp/usr/ports/dns/bind94/work/bind-9.4.3-P3/COPYRIGHT /var/tmp/usr/ports/dns/bind94/work/bind-9.4.3-P3/FAQ  /var/tmp/usr/ports/dns/bind94/work/bind-9.4.3-P3/README /usr/share/doc/bind94/
/bin/mkdir -p /var/named/usr/etc
/bin/ln -sf /etc/namedb/named.conf /usr/etc/named.conf
ln: /usr/etc/named.conf: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/dns/bind94.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/dns/bind94.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/dns/bind94.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade20090901-13001-4d6717-0 env UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=bind94-base-9.4.3.2 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=9.4.3.2 make reinstall
